title: Compose public secure RPL stack
description: After durable-state fail-closed changes, Stack is private but every public RplStack constructor requires Stack<R>, making RplStack externally unconstructible. Re-exporting Stack would reopen raw/plaintext CoAP paths through Stack and RplStack::send_ipv6_raw. Design one constructible production owner that combines RPL routing and SecureStack while preventing plaintext CoAP. This blocks claiming the converged public runtime API ready.
